name: Pre-Mortem
what_it_is: Assumes a decision has failed 12 months from now and works backward to find the causes.
core_mechanic: "It is 12 months from now. This failed completely. What happened?" Generate specific failure causes. Rank by likelihood x severity. These become risks to mitigate.
when_to_use: Before committing to a major decision / Optimism bias is high / Everyone is aligned but nobody has articulated what could go wrong
when_not_to_use: After an irreversible decision / For small reversible decisions / When the team is already demoralized
ideaos_application: Agent 3 generates 5 specific failure scenarios, ranks by likelihood x severity, for each identifies one concrete mitigation action.
